prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `42918530`.
codex_response:
Implemented the new ARC2 package in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_42918530/__init__.py#L1), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_42918530/verifier.py#L1), [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_42918530/generator.py#L1), and [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_42918530/notes.md#L1). The rule is: in a lattice of separated `5x5` single-color frames, any color that has one non-empty `3x3` interior exemplar propagates that interior shape into every blank frame of the same color; colors with no non-empty exemplar stay unchanged.

`arc2_opus46_summary.json` was used as the working hint, and `arc2_sonnet45_summary.jsonl` was discarded because its row-wise leftmost-template claim contradicts the training examples; that mismatch is recorded in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_42918530/notes.md#L1). The generator matches the task family by explicitly building the same rectangular frame lattice, repeating colors across cells, assigning one patterned exemplar to selected colors, and leaving some colors blank-only. No new primitive was needed in `arc2/dsl_ext.py`.

Validation passed end to end: official verification `5/5`, generated verification `1000/1000`. Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/42918530/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/42918530/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/42918530/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/42918530/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/42918530/previews/preview_03.png). I also visually checked the previews and they look on-family.
